1mo ago [...] Esmat Nawahda

@mohsinproduct  Great question, and honestly one of the more interesting engineering challenges we're working through.

For soft categories, which is our current focus, apparel, footwear, bags, accessories, furniture, the geometry is complex but the constraints are well-defined. We've built the generative pipeline to output structured specs with dimensions, tolerances, and materials that map to what factories actually need. [...] Super excited to finally have this out in the world. Would love your feedback — drop your idea in the comments and I'll generate a tech pack for you right here!

— Esmat Nawahda

Muharrem Yurtsever
Genpire

Genpire

@esmatnawahda that "worst day" framing is the exact mindset I steal every time I sit down to hammer out a new test. The real reason I'm stuck in the QA and marketing infra weeds is because we made a pact on day one: if it doesn't clear that bar, it doesn't ship. I’m incredibly proud of where we’ve finally landed. It’s a massive day for the whole crew

Olúmidé Gbenro
Creatoor AI

results.title: Vidcard: The World's First Video Business Card—Be Unforgettable | Product Hunt
results.content:
2. On Reducing Hesitation (My Recommendation): My advice to a first-time buyer would be a "Two-Card Strategy":

 Keep one as your permanent "Presentation Device" (Show & Return) for everyday meetings.
 Keep a second one as a "Golden Ticket"—ready to be gifted when that life-changing opportunity (social or business) arises. I believe that investment will pay for itself in one interaction.

3. On User Traction: You guessed it right. Founders and Sales Pros are responding the most right now. They seem to feel the pain of "lost leads" the most acutely.

Thanks again for the detailed review, it helps a lot!

Report

Report

Vidcard

Vidcard

Vidcard

Maker

@chrismessina   
Great question! Personally, both scenarios happen for me.

When I’m talking to clients who aren’t necessarily priority connections or have lower immediate interest, I might just hand over my business card to break the ice and introduce myself quickly.
